name: twisted-honeypots

[SCAFFOLD generated from XORCISM.TOOL #570 by tool_to_connector.py — implement run() in run.py to map twisted-honeypots output to the XORCISM findings model {assets, services, cpes, vulns}.]

parameters.name: target

parameters.name: file
